case_title: KRESTIN SCHOLD RESPONDENT VS. WILLIAM J. SEPATIS APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT SEPATIS, WILLIAM J. AS TO RESPONDENT SCHOLD, KRESTIN HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-08-2004 - AFTER HEARING, AND THE MATTER HAVING BEEN SUBMITTED, COURT ORDERS: JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $5,000 AND $52 IN COSTS IS AWARDED TO KRESTIN SCHOLD. MS. SCHOLD'S ORAL MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES IS DENIED. JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF, JUDGE PRO TEM. G. PEERLESS, CLK.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SCHOLD, KRESTIN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SEPATIS, WILLIAM J. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
